meaning: n.髦ｲ謚､迚ｩ,謚､鄂ｩ,逶ｾ,逶ｾ迥ｶ迚ｩvt.(from) 菫晄侃,髦ｲ謚､v.驕ｮ阡ｽ
examples: He clanged his sword three times on his shield.
